title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 15 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 15 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 15 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/05/2024
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower, futures fall in the day. The main contract I2409 closed at 865.5 .an decrease of 0.75% throughout the day . some traders were negative to sell; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand.
